glue.partition.skewedinfo.CfnAbout: Specifies skewed values in a table. Skewed values are those that occur with very high frequency.

glue.partition.skewedinfo.SkewedColumnNa.Description: A list of names of columns that contain skewed values.

glue.partition.skewedinfo.SkewedColumnVa.Description: A mapping of skewed values to the columns that contain them.
A list of values that appear so frequently as to be considered skewed.
